name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The results and the work ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
I am deeply disappointed that we did not win in Texas.

Despite record turnout and an extraordinary effort on the part of our
volunteers, Texas voters chose Donald Trump and Republican incumbents at
nearly every place on the ballot.

For whatever it’s worth, it looks to be part of a larger, national trend.
No matter the devastation wrought by this administration — hundreds of
thousands dead from Covid and tens of millions out of work — our fellow
Americans in state after state have voted to reduce the Democrats’
majority in the U.S. House, to keep control of the Senate in Republican
hands and to deliver an uncomfortably close Presidential race.

As we continue to follow the national results, I wanted to leave you with
a look at the work we’ve accomplished this year. It may offer only cold
comfort in the wake of these losses, but these achievements are worth
keeping in mind as we begin to think about the work that lies ahead.

Over the course of this year Powered by People's volunteers and supporters
like you are responsible for the following:

* We made over 76 million contact attempts to Texas voters (57.8 million
texts and 18.3 million calls);

* We helped register nearly 200,000 likely-Democrat Texas voters;

* During the beginning of the pandemic, before the CARES Act was passed
by Congress, we filled over 17,000 food bank shift hours across Texas;

* We brought in more than 10,000 volunteers to call, text or knock on
the doors of Texas voters;

* We helped raise $2,034,165 for Democratic candidates and organizers in
Texas (in addition to what we raised to run Powered by People);

And this one doesn’t have a measurable number to it, but I know it to be
true: we gave it our best and we gave it our all.

I can’t help but imagine what we could have done if we were not restrained
by the pandemic from knocking on doors and meeting voters at their homes,
in their communities, across the state.

We’ve built a powerful grassroots volunteer organization and I’m hopeful
that what we’ve learned this past year can be put to use in winning
elections in future years. Remember, this state last voted for the
Democratic nominee in 1976; last sent a Democrat to the Senate in 1988;
last elected any Democrat statewide in 1994. We’re bound to get knocked
down a few times (maybe a lot of times) before we finally win. The
question for you, for me, for all of us, is: are you willing to get up
again?

As awful as the Texas results are, as hard as it is right now, we must
move forward and try again. Because, what’s the alternative? Can you
accept conceding the future of this state to permanent GOP and Trumpist
control? There’s much to learn from this election. Many people to whom we
must humbly listen, to better understand what’s happened and what we can
do better. But let’s commit ourselves now to doing whatever it takes when
we get back up and get back after it.

I was watching the returns last night, and, exhausted from the day and
dispirited from the results, I walked upstairs early, got in bed and
passed out for 9 hours. I haven’t slept more than 5 hours straight in
months. But I think my body and my mind knew that it was over, we’d done
all we could, we pushed as hard we knew how, we left it all on the field
and it was time to acknowledge there was no more that could be done for
this election.

Now, like you, I’m watching the remaining states declare their winners for
President as we approach a clear victor in the Electoral College. I remain
ready to do whatever I can in the coming days for our democracy.

But for now, I am overcome by my deep gratitude for you and this team. I
can’t tell you how inspired I am by all who contributed to the work,
knowing the sacrifice entailed and the willing suspension of cynicism and
fatigue that is required to believe in Texas. It leaves me feeling hopeful
still, and only strengthens my dedication to Texas, to this team and to
the work of helping this state fulfill its potential and promise. I hope
to once again have the chance to do that work with you.

With love and gratitude,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1001&akid=111663%2E444211%2Eml6tcY

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

subject: Thank You

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/645160a681c2/thank-you?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Last night's election results did not produce the outcome that we had hoped for and worked so hard for. Today has been a difficult day, but I am filled with so much gratitude for all of your support.

This election cycle was unlike any other, and I could not have navigated my way to the finish line without you having my back. Our team put in a tremendous amount of hard work, and we wouldn't have been able to do that without your support.

I am proud of the way we ran this race. When we decided to say no to any corporate PAC money, we knew that we would be relying on individual contributions from everyday folks who want a government that works for them, and not just for the wealthy and well-connected. And every single one of you came through.

Because of your support, we shattered fundraising records for Democrats in this district and paved the way for a strong progressive movement in northern Illinois. We might not have come out on top this time, but our work was not in vain.

Thank you for having my back over the last 14 months. Your support means the world to me.

Dani Brzozowski

clean_body: | | | | | | | Last night's election results did not produce the outcome that we had hoped for and worked so hard for. Today has been a difficult day, but I am filled with so much gratitude for all of your support. This election cycle was unlike any other, and I could not have navigated my way to the finish line without you having my back. Our team put in a tremendous amount of hard work, and we wouldn't have been able to do that without your support. I am proud of the way we ran this race. When we decided to say no to any corporate PAC money, we knew that we would be relying on individual contributions from everyday folks who want a government that works for them, and not just for the wealthy and well-connected. And every single one of you came through. Because of your support, we shattered fundraising records for Democrats in this district and paved the way for a strong progressive movement in northern Illinois. We might not have come out on top this time, but our work was not in vain. Thank you for having my back over the last 14 months. Your support means the world to me. Dani Brzozowski | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Dani for Illinois | Our mailing address is: Dani for Illinois PO Box 1671 LaSalle, IL 61301 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: What's next?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Thank you for all you've done... now the work begins. No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-e-xijjryd-ahkdjtlkr-d/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xijjryd-ahkdjtlkr-r/) PeterFirst, and most importantly: **THANK YOU. **Thank you for your time, your energy, your support, and everything you've done to bring us to VICTORY in this critical race! **Now, it's time to get to work.** I promised you I would take the fight to Congress, to Nancy Pelosi and AOC, to the elitists in Washington, and to give voice to the forgotten people of this country. Today, we start turning those words into **ACTION**. We don't know what the final numbers are going to be yet, but the margin in Congress and the balance of power in D.C. are going to be close. Now isn't the time to pat ourselves on the back and go home - now is the time to **prepare ourselves for what's coming next. **I was proud to have your support in the campaign, and I'll be honored to fight by your side in the battles ahead. Let's get to work.Scott Fitzgerald [Join Fitz - Contribute](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xijjryd-ahkdjtlkr-y/)

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Thank You
body:
Thank You No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-q/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Thank You](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-j/)
Thank you for bestowing upon me the honor of representing you in Congress for another two years. This week I briefly discuss last night's election and reveal some surprising facts. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Final Argument](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-d/)
In this week's blog, I discuss the upcoming election and make my case why this will be one of the most important elections in a generation. In my race, the Ohio 1st District, will voters continue to support me, a fiscal conservative, who is pro-life, pro-police and has the experience to support our community through the pandemic - or will they support an anti-police, anti-capitalism, extreme want-to-be radical who will rubber-stamp Pelosi and AOC's laundry list of job killing Marxist policies. I would like to believe, the choice is clear! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [2 Weeks to Go!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-u/)
It's hard to believe that the much-anticipated 2020 election is almost upon us. And in some ways, it actually already is, as many people in our state and across the country have already voted by absentee ballot, or by early-voting at the local board of elections. In this week's blog, I will give you my best prediction as to what will happen and who will be victorious. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-o/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-b/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-n/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-p/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-x/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-m/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutjkihl-kujkulhluu-c/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

body:
Here is an update on the state of the Senate.
Friend, here is an update on the state of the Senate.

Our country's future is still very much in the air, and it is more important than ever to Hold the Line and maintain control of the Senate Majority.

We have accomplished great things this election cycle with historic wins in Maine, Iowa, and Alabama, but there is still more we need to do.

[**HOLD THE LINE - DONATE NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PqHpzgkNUxqtt-r3rodyGIKK7JJwcCWCC2TWydJi7Z31m5yFpW9QPlXmdas9hk8UBbPrX4ECIvqc8Lonhmpbf_F_H01Jm1Cxt4wXtsQPpTjkc1XYcbgfvBrbVbZ6B9wZzM5MwMmpSeBDY6skEok614_iXkObfT40lB0oOOGLdOnCfyLfAQX4I5nN7o2s0ks8hgjLsUesan-QJtZUS_2AhiZKa62Np0jtUOuz2BIJPVtJQ5bZR5BUzZxpxHDZUM8RRZp66gLOscI9TrlSdKkUZY8OwdSRyFL1U7GBAayZmoi4nFdLVT5XC2GXigMvqTBehlpz9ESdSQe7_GvyNYRI07Gpuv_M57ef1BfpLDAhMryoA_C1QdgWACXMgtzstVYPVFESmozmvT-129GUpzWrvGXSXlUs1Tl1QH4GYBhJPpotNvFTECpTAyqsycvRuacqXcri-kssO1A=&c=FcKnou-FczBsn2fBzXoEk476UIveQFLtFhpbbL2I4dkUF4yopfIdJA==&ch=6kpLrjhC64J13qgHT8xz50blBd2pZUDNyNzISA_jiGuLCwUXN6KJCw==)

We’ve proved the pundits wrong and we’re UP in this race! But’s it’s extremely close. Right now, we are up 895 votes out of 377,155 cast. This margin is razor thin, but it is real. Now, we need to keep it. **[We’re launching a RECOUNT FUND immediately today, to defend against any and all Democrat attempts to undermine the integrity of this election.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/ab37daab0195d1e1/1c94e49c4fdb1c6fc3d6b838967d376c/34533)** We need to be fully prepared to beat back efforts by the Pelosi campaign machine and the army of left-wing special interests (not to mention their big dollar attorneys) as they attempt to contest this election and take the 14th from the people. [**RUSH SUPPORT FOR RECOUNT FUND**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/ab37daab0195d1e1/35024f8aaa5ac67fc3d6b838967d376c/34533) Thank you so much for all your support this year, Peter. I am so proud of the campaign we ran. It’s clear that my message resonated with voters... failed fake nurse Lauren Underwood DOES NOT represent the good people of the 14th, serving as merely another Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp. name: Mike Siegel
subject: Our movement lives on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress
body:
|
---

| | All I can say is _**thank you so much.**_ Together, we gave hope to so many, to envision what real representation could look like. We helped build a movement of progressives in _red_ Texas and shook up a former conservative stronghold. We won over 186,000 votes, made millions of calls and texts, earned financial support from over 37,000 individuals, and shared our commitment to deep structural change with so many. _We’ve set the wheels in motion for a better future._ We’ve built an incredible, diverse coalition, and it’s been an honor to have your support and work alongside you. **My run for Congress might have ended, but our work is only beginning.** I look forward to continuing the fight for passing Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and many other policies that will make Texas better for all of us. Thank you again for your support — your confidence in our campaign is truly humbling. Onward, Mike
---

| |
---

subject: The fight isn’t over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee, 1201 F Street, NW, Suite 675, Washington, DC 20004
body:
Runoffs and recounts are yet to come
Friend,
November 3rd has passed, but our fight is far from being over.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. We accomplish this by working directly with Republican leadership in the states and providing them with resources, training, and funding. We have nearly 200,000 donors in all 50 states. The RSLC invested a record $45 million into state-level races in the 2017-2018 election cycle, which contributed to state-level Republicans maintaining 61 of 99 legislative chamber majorities, holding 25 lieutenant governor seats, and 29 secretaries of state offices. name: Margaret Good
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21223804/260047119/-940294256?refcode=110520-es-thank-you&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTIyMzY0YS05YjFmLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3luQbkQFyNzkFdYLSHu9nUhgLUr7oHLGEUAtEyMRO_c=&emci=c07a2e3a-971f-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=1522364a-9b1f-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644)

Like many of you, I am still processing the election results. But, even with the great disappointments on election night, I have this overwhelming and persistent feeling of gratitude -- and that is because of you all. Thank you. Thank you for believing that change is possible. Thank you for believing it so strongly that you were willing to donate your time, your money, and your resources to this campaign.
Dear friend,

Like many of you, I am still processing the election results. But, even with the great disappointments on election night, I have this overwhelming and persistent feeling of gratitude -- and that is because of you all. Thank you. Thank you for believing that change is possible. Thank you for believing it so strongly that you were willing to donate your time, your money, and your resources to this campaign.

Those of us who live in these tough districts know that change doesn’t happen overnight, but we also know it is worth fighting for. And, we know that every phone call we make, every door we knock on, every voter who hears our message matters. We know that there are setbacks and that there are successes, but most of all, we know the fight to create a world that we are proud to live in doesn’t stop -- no matter who wins an election.

Thank you to all of you who have joined me in this work. Thank you for your support and for your encouragement. Thank you for all you have taught me on this journey.

I am proud of the work we have done. Thank you for being part of it.

Margaret

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
---
Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States

name: Josh Hicks
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Friends,

It has been a real honor to be your candidate in this race.

When I started out this race, I had more than a few people tell me that stepping up to run for Congress against a four-term incumbent wasn't a good move for my political career. But I didn't run this race to advance a career. I ran it because it was the right thing to do.

Growing up, my dad always told me: If you see a problem that needs fixing, you step up and fix it.

For me, that's what this race was about. It was about stepping up to try to solve a problem. It was about protecting people's healthcare, getting broadband for communities that lack it, and proposing policies that would help folks who are struggling. It was about speaking out on behalf of those who have been left behind by a broken political system. It was about giving a voice to regular folks.

It was my honor to be able to do that in this race, and I was only able to do that because of you.

To everyone who was a part of this movement, everyone who took a chance on a farm boy from Fleming County — I owe you a tremendous debt of gratitude.

Whether you spent your free time making phone calls, or gave a few of your hard-earned dollars, you made this campaign what it was. Your belief and energy sustained me, and for that I am deeply grateful.

Please stay engaged, and stay hopeful. And if you need to log off social media and go fishing for a day or two now and then — that's okay too. I know I'll be out there catching some smallmouth and crappie before the water gets too cold.

Thank you again for everything. I appreciate you.

Josh

https://www.facebook.com/JoshHicksKY
https://twitter.com/joshhicksky
Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States

name: Roger Misso
subject: Let's show the Biden Fight Fund - and 8 of our candidates in danger right now - that we have their backs!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

I'll be brief:

As Donald Trump tweets outrageous lies about vote-counting and his cronies launch specious lawsuits against Americans who legally cast their ballots, Joe Biden and our veteran and military family candidates for Congress are caught in the crosshairs. At this moment, 8 of our candidates and the Biden campaign's lead in crucial battleground states are in danger of GOP malfeasance and outright theft.

_That 's why we need you **now**._ _**[Until results are final, we will be matching every contribution dollar-for-dollar up to $5,000 for the Biden Fight Fund to help the campaign and our candidates defend themselves and protect the vote.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZJKs7Q3ufY7N7MTx0zQI1mZ55GBpfeavHLOkTXMzfas=/4PydVLq1JtcobLfqX2UNzs87ng8e-KkTRID7a-5wyhM=)**_

We do not have a moment - or a vote - to lose. Thank you for joining us in supporting our democracy to ensure that every vote is counted!

In solidarity,
Roger

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana - reasons to be thankful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Hoosiers across our state made their voices heard loud and clear — they resoundingly voted to send Governor Holcomb back to the Statehouse to continue Friend,
**Thanks to the hard work of Hoosiers like you, Governor Holcomb earned re-election on Tuesday! **
Hoosiers across our state made their voices heard loud and clear — they resoundingly voted to send Governor Holcomb back to the Statehouse to continue the work of building One Indiana for All.
We’re honored to have had the support of such an incredible grassroots community, and we truly couldn’t have done it without you. All of the time, money, and effort you put into our campaign is remarkable, and it inspired us every single day.
So for this week’s One Indiana (our final one of campaign season!), we wanted to give a shout out to all of the people who contributed to our campaign and made it such an incredible experience.
* **Every Hoosier who went out to vote!**
* **Every Hoosier who volunteered!**
* **Every Hoosier who donated!**
* **Every Hoosier who was part of this team in any capacity!**
* **Every poll worker and election volunteer!**
* **All the awesome Hoosiers that Eric got to meet and spend time with along the way! Including a great haircut with Rex in Roanoke, making candy canes at the Martinsville Candy Kitchen, and many, many more.**
* **Everyone who has put in the work — making it possible to continue building One Indiana for All. **

We’re so grateful for all of your time, effort, and donations. You are truly what made our campaign special, and we know that Eric is blown away by your support.
But we’re not even close to being done, friend.
**The election might be over, but we’re already starting to work toward building One Indiana for All!**
Once again, thank you for all of your support and hard work.
Sincerely,
\- Holcomb Crew | |
---
---
|
|
| |

**Also, please join the campaign for a talkers call for the latest updates today at 11:30AM EST. name: Jerry Carl
subject: ** President Trump Needs EMERGENCY Support **
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jerry Carl for Congress
body:
Please take action immediately. Read more >>>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/fa64e08aba739edb/f674a3689e276969c3d6b838967d376c/32613) [**🚨🚨 STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP 🚨🚨**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/fa64e08aba739edb/84f2b7d06b433d11c3d6b838967d376c/32613) Hey Fellow Conservative, Thank you, again, for all of your incredible support this year.
We WON a hard-fought race, and I can’t wait to get to work fighting for YOU in Congress!

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: To my volunteers...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
While we are forced to wait due to the failed bureaucratic and Democrat
leadership within our state, I just wanted to take a minute to thank every....

Peter,

While we are forced to wait due to the failed bureaucratic and Democrat
leadership within our state, I just wanted to take a minute to thank every
single volunteer who was the driving force of this campaign from the bottom of
my heart.

Without your long nights, early mornings in the field, on the phones, and
getting to the polls, our campaign simply wouldn’t be where it is right now.
This is not just about a single candidate. This is a team effort, it is simply
an incredible movement that we have seen across PA07 that people want to see
equality of opportunity and not equality of outcome.

As I’ve said daily during this campaign, I will always reject socialism, fight
big government regulators, and continue to work for every single person and
family of our beloved district.

The fight has only just begun.

Keep fighting,

Lisa Scheller

Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Together, we made history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
We did it. You did it.Together, we made history last night. Governor Eric Holcomb was reelected. Our super majority in the | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a34aabccf3)
---
| |
---
| Hoosier Republican,

We did it.

**__You did it.__**

Together, we made history on Tuesday. Governor Eric Holcomb was reelected. Our supermajority in the Indiana House grew and we held our supermajority in the Senate. Todd Rokita won a decisive victory and is now our Attorney General-elect. Victoria Spartz won following a hard-fought campaign in the 5th Congressional District after facing a barrage of inaccurate attacks. We’re still compiling data, but it looks like we’ll also extend our success at the local level and celebrate more Republican wins for county commissioners.

And, once again, Indiana was first on the board for President Trump and Hoosier Vice President Mike Pence.

There are still votes to count and races to decide, but one thing is already clear: Election Night 2020 was a huge success for Indiana Republicans.

And that’s because of supporters, volunteers, and voters like you.

I am profusely grateful for all you do to move our party forward. Victories like the ones last night are only possible because of our motivated and energized team.

We believe in the importance of teamwork. There are no lonely victories in Indiana. So, please, take a moment to celebrate your contributions to our winning team and take pride in the role you played to get us the “W.”

Of course, our work isn’t over. In many ways, in fact, it is just beginning. I wanted to share this brief note of appreciation for all that you do. Serving as chairman during this era of unprecedented wins for Indiana Republicans has been a highlight of my professional career. I’m unbelievably proud of all we’ve accomplished, together.

Congratulations and, again, thank you. You mean the world of difference for Indiana.

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman
---
|
---
---
---

_She joined Fox and Friends to discuss her exhilarating and historic win, the red wave that swept South Carolina on Election Night, and yes, our celebration at the Waffle House where everything began. _ [ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=8daa800ce58a4e67b93d14ddd87b04b3&_e=OCzh1qqGvUxyQyGlBFzw81WQgU3jJ4Jom8YBUoKGeda4EkLRWpJU8DlJ4rRDEEl8E0kct2G_9yOLfIPUK3si5jgXzmOYlrIJSEPkzJcuaZTBxQnGO-LE33i2VNUI6-IPNU28E-LYInsJRZynHPdgwN4-z0WIas7IIzl4Q_83Bg9XoCw75d1Ea0OPN4G-oggMVfAcqpfvywYrqqOJlQEMvsifi2_3NkkFJyfmeU4DDKNUeStSNX6OGHeg2yPctmfUQ1ALGSLZUcaEguxuVzUC2ZpXzniL2X_QtceKqTPvt2NdhoA05AgPYy77J0bx0vv6N311IllksXLuon_ZYjnJTiO5GP07gzUSl765oUoZ0JhH05kt1G8lYhFDFJ6ST-zwSBiIluepSAOZ_imUIYIffo0YfUp7BCX_9UR5FHr-LzYRqu9EA5SVZ3bKwHjnZ3yl) [**Watch Nancy on Fox and Friends**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=8daa800ce58a4e67b93d14ddd87b04b3&_e=OCzh1qqGvUxyQyGlBFzw81WQgU3jJ4Jom8YBUoKGeda4EkLRWpJU8DlJ4rRDEEl8E0kct2G_9yOLfIPUK3si5jgXzmOYlrIJSEPkzJcuaZTBxQnGO-LE33i2VNUI6-IPNU28E-LYInsJRZynHPdgwN4-z0WIas7IIzl4Q_83Bg9XoCw75d1Ea0OPN4G-oggMVfAcqpfvywYrqqOJlQEMvsifi2_3NkkFJyfmeU4DDKMIGWcdp7XcvwsEpVer8T_wUPNmF0z0Yy1sMlFcRYGr77_gYK1dwpS4Enijar7kiYOYdDfUuzjUO6m6T_fJd611zl8WbE6bnww-f-Uy1ZVmOWcwd9njIsfOETIn15r--JkL6Oug7AMO813z16Jd9RKMptoCZpKaWm8xGHbPbFT1DWBhEDTUW6wQ3DKU7hk2VtluQOoW0jHtvl_f2WpuN-fc) **Flipping this seat back to Republicans was huge, and we couldn’t be more proud of the campaign we ran. **
Despite the hundreds of millions of dollars being spent by Democratic candidates in South Carolina, we were able to make history and deliver Lowcountry First leadership to our district. Our campaign was groundbreaking, and we proved everyone — the pollsters, my opponent, and the media — wrong.
Friend, we couldn’t have made this history without you, and Nancy is honored to have this incredible opportunity to serve the families, businesses, and workers of the Lowcountry.
_“It’s not just Democratic women that are breaking barriers, Republican women are doing it all across the country...I’m the first Republican woman ever elected to Congress from South Carolina” - Nancy Mace_ [**Watch Nancy on Fox and Friends**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=8daa800ce58a4e67b93d14ddd87b04b3&_e=OCzh1qqGvUxyQyGlBFzw81WQgU3jJ4Jom8YBUoKGeda4EkLRWpJU8DlJ4rRDEEl8E0kct2G_9yOLfIPUK3si5jgXzmOYlrIJSEPkzJcuaZTBxQnGO-LE33i2VNUI6-IPNU28E-LYInsJRZynHPdgwN4-z0WIas7IIzl4Q_83Bg9XoCw75d1Ea0OPN4G-oggMVfAcqpfvywYrqqOJlQEMvsifi2_3NkkFJyfmeU4DDKOl6g2uvVSTvB5LfE6PpaRP-XNnEEkGmp3BuhERD0h2Jz7247RcnMUY3HDxhaZ2eYK6LWx2s2AurIGivqjEDhPu4yVnJ03UueDNdBdtrRCfa_-I2n33kTm6LQ3y3a9A68H1MQxlbpU6mCLYNVyvZ4ViQ75wNPZ6ZCsOQ1g9HN3Kw8yzAtxldUdb_z_U2MDlNtkjM-s6zJ08RNDtbbErzNvs) Nancy’s ready to get to work on the issues that matter to the Lowcountry, and make a difference for our community in Washington.
**Watch her full interview on Fox and Friends here:[https://youtu.be/jfrFm3orGeA ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=8daa800ce58a4e67b93d14ddd87b04b3&_e=OCzh1qqGvUxyQyGlBFzw81WQgU3jJ4Jom8YBUoKGedbXFFJbBf1xrtHrnzvE4TC7l_nmcRP7mE-22jyBHgL6KMTUZ2z5_BgO3uPzd0Uz_KatENrIynKWZ81CfQNty2XazELpmrlHTfe3KnZKc5o9EOREuaMSuppqXFo4GGVUcXLLo14G57RPRmWTvpuJdlgIyp8sZsr_euWaZfYmfal8j8J38tF_58PcOlF5KFtytcw55-aNKhyLVeersaYxyosrjsKKb8m532VLJ20mupEMP3U8vtlgy4kd3yp1byupcZGOyjDmBak6ekIxyasOwtgcJpxkMyaFR9tSZsEaqKWQRqAH_AiW4J2vwEkh7VpCOeol6xAANjyFBhCyasNy2e9XAYV6D9y_9tALOQ-H_QhLTCGAp5tg-NJayzuKMotcHQ6DGEIdsfYkXzgluV5D1393-i6-JKVVDs0lRV9T121TJA%3D%3D)**

name: Susan Collins
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
I couldn't have won without you. I am so grateful for your support.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oxj7G50Wy2adHWviUF2vGg8nR1V81VAUnFTlUVZMDX-BBufcpzueD1JZLXArxKuR27OS59LKpZtZDrXXbcRCVXj2hswXM6HumbxBj6h-Go5P0cIC_TsQq3F7JPvkKk9Jgk9gzyzupF9J6z2z71nZqJ8_dj7p7AmWvGj6Mjhs-ARflV_A13L9HLcB4O1rGCa6mfaNxZv9pf6bLK-pw6Vsyx9rB7siIR4VyamlJXL5wxXJBcZnVbwPdnDNs8GkS_C2dAP5b3FsRsQIZYK0twLPOHz5XJamKaC6HcWPjn-VOvF1_NDSg2RBLPG9dUAB5xhAlXYrFjNWp9vhm76uBJtYtdxQkh7rOdwtoJYIwAoA8zAVKxSnLcJbEA==&c=iOkAGZdxpaaf7ml3xfy8WWGWb_JWvcJJFwOxh_a_Ao1WzEw7xMPajA==&ch=e_qzxR6Ru950nDrI5OCRDOYn5nqS7l8nGLIrLEh4yJPp_ItrsebBcg==)
Friend,
We did it! Yesterday, Sara Gideon called me to concede the Maine Senate race.
Friend, I couldn't have won if it hadn't been for you. I want to thank you for always being by my side. Every single public poll had our campaign down, but you and I knew those polls weren't reflecting reality. We knew that if we fought hard and worked together we could win this race -- **AND WE DID!**
Friend, the odds were stacked against us in every way possible. For two long years, the Democrats have put a bullseye on my back. My campaign was outraised and outspent 5-1. We were told by pollsters and the media that we had no chance. But guess what: we proved them all wrong!!
I am honored to represent Mainers and Americans in the United States Senate. And as I go back to Washington, I know we have A LOT of work ahead of us. I will never stop fighting for our shared values and beliefs.
I will forever be grateful for the support and friendship you have shown me throughout this campaign. Your support gave me the strength to power through the difficult days and ultimately WIN!
Thank you so much for being there for me. I can't wait to continue to fight for YOU!
Sincerely,
Susan Collins

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Everything is at stake in GA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend,

The votes are in and it has been decided- **Georgia will be holding runoffs in January.**

Because of this, a lot hangs in the balance. If we lose this race, we lose the majority in the Senate, flipping it from Red to Blue.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pat=20Hackett?=
subject: Pat Sends a Message of Thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Going forward, we must hold our Representative in Congress accountable, and We, the People, must stay vigilant. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=1b288c7cf9&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Thank you for supporting this campaign and our shared values. Your exemplary goodness and multiple generosities are sources of great hope.

Regardless of the outcome of yesterday’s election, our path forward as a Nation and in this Congressional District remains a renewed commitment to Dignity and Justice for All, not the few. Additionally, our path forward requires the reclaiming of our voice and values in Washington. We must reclaim our Constitutional and moral authority as We the People if our Nation is to continue and contribute internationally toward the common good.

Now, more than ever, good government requires our Hoosier work ethic, and mandates our understanding of hospitality where all have a seat at the table. In our national crisis of COVID-19, we must pursue just economic policies by which the hungry are fed, the naked are clothed, and the thirsty are given drink. Now more than ever, we must heal the sick through access to healthcare, and we must not abandon the imprisoned to the immorality of racist, profit driven penal systems.

The forces at work in our Nation, seeking to divide us one from the other, are virulent and pernicious. They include financial corruption, racism, and the subjugation of women and sexual minorities. They also include an authoritarianism and religious licentiousness in our federal government that are attacking our 1st and 14th Amendment liberties –– while also attacking our Nation’s commitment to reason, evidence, and science which are the bases of our rule of law, democratic norms, and political decency.

Going forward, we must hold our Representative in Congress accountable, and We, the People, must stay vigilant.

With a full and grateful heart,
---
|
---
| Pat
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=76e422dd32&e=5886ca081d)

Our race has been called and I'm thrilled to say that we DEFEATED my radical liberal opponent. Despite being outraised AND outspent by TENS OF MILLIONS of dollars, our grassroots supporters proved that they will NEVER allow Kentucky to turn into the next New York or California. However, our fight isn't over yet. We don't know who has control of the Senate and we will likely have multiple Senate runoff elections to win, which is why I need your IMMEDIATE SUPPORT TODAY.

Democrats and their leftist allies have thrown open the spending spigot, flooding our state with liberal campaign cash to flip this seat. == If we learned anything this year, it's that outorganizing and outworking the Democrats is our key to victory. We can't afford to have any conservative on the sidelines. That's why I'm writing today, Friend. I 'm urging EVERY Republican, in Georgia and across America, to join our efforts before it's too late! == == == == == == Senator Loeffler, a conservative businesswoman and political outsider, has proven that she's exactly the type of principled, tough, and determined leader we need fighting for Georgia and America. She's unabashedly pro-life , pro-Second Amendment , pro-border wall , and pro-religious freedom. She's fighting with all she's got to stand up for our values and protect our liberty. Georgia is the front line now to stop the Democrats' radical agenda. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: All eyes on Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
I'm in the fight of my life against unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) to flip Georgia's Senate seat blue. And according to _The Washington Post_ , what happens here could determine whether Democrats are able to secure Senate control and enact our bold agenda. I urgently need your help to win this race -- but before I ask you to chip in, I need to give you an update on why your support is so important.
**Right now, our momentum is unbelievable.** After starting this campaign trailing our GOP opponent, our people-powered movement surged into first place -- something pundits said was impossible just a few months ago. Now, we've forced a head-to-head runoff election with Kelly Loeffler on Jan. 5 -- and experts from Nate Silver to NBC News say we can really win this thing. In other words: **We're within striking distance of defeating the Republicans and making history.**
Here's the bad news: With all eyes on Georgia, Loeffler is spending over $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to defeat me, and the GOP is funneling in millions more to buy this seat for Mitch McConnell and block the Democratic agenda. Experts say this could be the most expensive race in history.
I don't take a dime from corporate PACs -- I never have and I never will. But with Republicans spending MILLIONS to defeat me and keep this seat red, I need an immediate surge of grassroots support to win. [**So please, will you give $3 or more right now to defeat the GOP and flip this Georgia seat blue?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc617/2a380d31/202c1944/f040da/3526641690/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEwNV9td2g0cndfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20201105_mwh4rw_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
There's far more than a Senate seat on the line in this race. My opponent is a far-right Trump loyalist who has run a campaign of divisiveness and bigotry. Meanwhile, I'm a pastor who's devoted my life to service -- and in January, I could become Georgia's first-ever Black senator. With health care and the future of the Supreme Court on the line, we simply can't afford to send another Trump Republican to Washington.
My campaign set a goal to raise another $25,000 by midnight to defeat Kelly Loeffler -- and in a race this close, falling short just isn't an option. But unfortunately, our campaign is not on track to raise what we need to win -- which could mean we have to take our ads off the air and cut back our voter protection efforts.
We can only win Georgia and secure Senate control for Democrats with immediate support from folks like you, everyone. So please, I'm personally asking because the stakes are so incredibly high: [**Will you give $3 or more today to help us win in Georgia, defeat the GOP and secure a Democratic Senate majority?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc617/2a380d31/202c1944/f040da/3526641690/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEwNV9td2g0cndfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20201105_mwh4rw_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thanks for pitching in at this historic moment.
Raphael Warnock

> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc617/2a380d31/202c1944/f040da/3526641690/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEwNV9td2g0cndfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20201105_mwh4rw_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc617/2a380d31/202c1944/f040db/3526641690/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH
Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.
Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

Friends,

I want to personally thank you for all of your support throughout this campaign. We couldn't have achieved this victory without each and everyone of you. I look forward to another term serving you on the Mississippi Supreme Court where I will continue to uphold the rule of law as a fair and balanced jurist.

My family and I are forever grateful for your trust and support.

Sincerely,

Josiah

name: Mark Warner
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

I am so incredibly grateful that the people of this Commonwealth have spoken and decided to send me back to the Senate for another term. While we wait for the national results, I am optimistic that we will see a good outcome for our country.

I think it's safe to say that Election Night this year was different than any other, and that the world looks a lot different than we thought it would nine months ago.

Thank you for your resilience and your dedication. Thank you for making calls, sending texts, and talking with your friends to make sure we got as many Virginians as possible to the polls for this critical election. Thank you for showing up to elect Democrats that will lead our country forward, even in the midst of a global pandemic.

**Simply put, thank you for everything.** None of this would have been possible without the hard work of countless Virginians who worked their hearts out during this most unusual election.

Seeing all of the people, from all walks of life, who came together to work for a common cause during this election cycle is so heartening. The truth is that, as a country, we've been too divided for too long. Now, we face a pandemic that we're only going to be able to defeat if we're united in our approach. That means we have to turn the page on divisive rhetoric and heal from the name-calling and lies to find paths to work together for the common cause.

If these last nine months have shown us anything, it's that our citizens can more than meet the moment -- and we need leaders who are willing to rise to the challenge and lead with integrity and heart. Leaders who accept with grace and peace the verdict of the American people without encouraging violence or seeking to undermine confidence in the results, regardless of the outcome.

We can get through this. We will recover. Our country has seen challenging times before, and we will again. We have always been able to persevere and emerge stronger -- and I believe we are seeing the beginning of that hope in our country now.

Brighter days are ahead for Virginia and for our country.

Sincerely, |
---
-- Mark Warner

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9d1/53d9897e/5513ede0/1c88cf47/1373321449/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: New guidance pt. 2
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
It was about a month ago that we started to see our COVID-19 numbers ticking up, and we asked everyone to find small changes we can make in our own lives to keep people safe, from wearing our masks more often to canceling social plans. To those who made changes last month, thank you. We also said at that time that if the trends continued in this direction, we'd have to impose new restrictions, and that was something we had hoped to avoid.
Unfortunately, we haven't seen the change in our numbers that we need to. Today Rhode Island set a new daily record for case numbers, and unfortunately we're not alone in this spike. It's happening all over the country and the world. In fact, just yesterday, the U.S. saw its first day with more than 100,000 new cases. Because of that, today we're announcing seven new measures that will take effect on Sunday. These measures are part of a regional approach in close coordination with Massachusetts and Connecticut. Over the next two weeks, we will be closely monitoring behavioral data to see if this approach is working or if we need to impose additional restrictions.
---
|
---
| 1. Effective Sunday, a stay-at-home advisory is in effect from 10pm-5am on weeknights, and 10:30pm-5am on Fridays and Saturdays. At that time, unless you're going to and from work or running essential errands like getting food or going to the pharmacy, you should be in your own home. Not someone else's home - your home. We know that late-night house parties are a major factor in this second wave. And if you're at a restaurant or bar until that time, once it closes, drive straight home. We're not going to take a heavy hand - as always, our approach calls for voluntary compliance. But if we do see big parties at any time of day, and particularly at night, we will break them up and fine you.
2. Also effective Sunday, all restaurants, bars, gyms, recreational facilities (such as casinos, bowling alleys, and museums), and personal services must close at 10pm on weeknights, and 10:30pm on Fridays and Saturdays. Restaurants can continue to offer takeout and drive-through after that time.
3. We're lowering the capacity limit for indoor events and venues of assembly to 50%, with a maximum of 125 people. For outdoors, the limit will be 66%, with a maximum of 150 people. This applies to things like performing arts venues, movie theaters, and houses of worship. I'd ask everyone to consider switching to virtual worship for the next few weeks.
4. We're reducing the limit for catered events to 25 indoors and 75 outdoors. If you already have a wedding planned in the next two weeks, we're able to consider an exception if you contact the Department of Business Regulation.
5. We're reducing the capacity limit at malls and big box stores - retailers with more than 30,000 sq. ft. of space - back to the Phase 2 limit of 1 person per 150 sq. ft. Over the last few weeks, we've started to see more crowding at these businesses, and we anticipate that will continue to increase as we head into a big shopping season.
6. In addition to working from home when possible, we're asking businesses to postpone or cancel nonessential work-related travel. We're also leading by example in this regard and have put a hiatus on work-related travel for state employees.
7. We're updating our masking guidance to require masks at all times with anyone you don't live with. That includes anytime you leave your home - including at the gym - and private gatherings if there's anyone there you don't live with.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012rRgIfd2XbvHi1VzO9R61sWEXYM808zagdNAURp6az9fe2e8JmoklNkizKMQ0ExyldecblP458EmYIurWl0Om_iTFd09qG0jOT8RmB8GVt-Lusmn7uFU33ZyCCrKUUt8fTzde1D4TTtJfXEg9QDvZWOlnAysBMv7zHnto28A9jI9wyi9yaXymx6yLWEIWvc7Kgtvj6EC0AU=&c=5wWnUfqB_mhcO0NDOKBMm9nXxhiGfECvD7T1ENOGl-bIhCkid0aIVA==&ch=5Mtgqka3LYD5YbmrC-Pd0rlCfHVoLTJCs3GdLfvfpgQ_Rk9S2evvwQ==)
---
| I know this is hard to hear for businesses - and particularly restaurants and bars. While it's my hope that doing this now will prevent us from needing to shut you down entirely in a few weeks, it's still tough. You're doing everything you can, but the fact is that anywhere that people are gathering and taking off masks, the virus is spreading, and that's unavoidable when there's food and drinks. Today, as we announce these new measures, I am also announcing that we will be sending grants to all active Rhode Island restaurant and bars impacted by this early closure order.
Restaurants and bars will receive between $2,000 and $10,000 based upon how much business they typically do. These businesses will need to attest that they were affected by this early closure, and then they can expect their grant from the Division of Taxation within 30 days. We know these grants might not make up for what has been an extraordinarily difficult time, but we hope it will help as we make another round of temporary sacrifices to stop the second wave.
I'm confident these targeted interventions will make a difference. But that's only true if we all take it to heart. It's been a long 8 months, and it's not lost on me how hard this is. I feel it myself, and I see it in my family. But I also know what can happen when Rhode Islanders rally together. We did it in the spring, and we became national leaders. Let's do it again.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012rRgIfd2XbvHi1VzO9R61sWEXYM808zagdNAURp6az9fe2e8JmoklDqnH44W_DQjU1zKFCj_Nfuztowuomn3SwHyFKp5ryTzYyac__RxxQ6nkUcjWmR0RQ1A-j-2bePqeCSTKsqhY11K8teHcu3JsQ73iGgwS4MlUB9r085vwVbKmNx9HC1rsazcOkefmJe4Fnne7mZRziX3Gd8abwrAWMI9RPoP7fHjAgsbcvgCdGqaOHFqIRa00U5j0tz1aZQRLffUi_h06pLQD0IwXM-uGYDR4Sijcp70TKyjia2cK1Yxzwc5MMNXQLYX-Utp3a4kENugKenewTc=&c=5wWnUfqB_mhcO0NDOKBMm9nXxhiGfECvD7T1ENOGl-bIhCkid0aIVA==&ch=5Mtgqka3LYD5YbmrC-Pd0rlCfHVoLTJCs3GdLfvfpgQ_Rk9S2evvwQ==).
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Hello friend, It was about a month ago that we started to see our COVID-19 numbers ticking up, and we asked everyone to find small changes we can make in our own lives to keep people safe, from wearing our masks more often to canceling social plans. To those who made changes last month, thank you. We also said at that time that if the trends continued in this direction, we'd have to impose new restrictions, and that was something we had hoped to avoid. Unfortunately, we haven't seen the change in our numbers that we need to. Today Rhode Island set a new daily record for case numbers, and unfortunately we're not alone in this spike. It's happening all over the country and the world. In fact, just yesterday, the U.S. saw its first day with more than 100,000 new cases. Because of that, today we're announcing seven new measures that will take effect on Sunday. These measures are part of a regional approach in close coordination with Massachusetts and Connecticut. Over the next two weeks, we will be closely monitoring behavioral data to see if this approach is working or if we need to impose additional restrictions. | | 1. Effective Sunday, a stay-at-home advisory is in effect from 10pm-5am on weeknights, and 10:30pm-5am on Fridays and Saturdays. At that time, unless you're going to and from work or running essential errands like getting food or going to the pharmacy, you should be in your own home. Not someone else's home - your home. We know that late-night house parties are a major factor in this second wave. And if you're at a restaurant or bar until that time, once it closes, drive straight home. We're not going to take a heavy hand - as always, our approach calls for voluntary compliance. But if we do see big parties at any time of day, and particularly at night, we will break them up and fine you. 2. Also effective Sunday, all restaurants, bars, gyms, recreational facilities (such as casinos, bowling alleys, and museums), and personal services must close at 10pm on weeknights, and 10:30pm on Fridays and Saturdays. Restaurants can continue to offer takeout and drive-through after that time. 3. We're lowering the capacity limit for indoor events and venues of assembly to 50%, with a maximum of 125 people. For outdoors, the limit will be 66%, with a maximum of 150 people. This applies to things like performing arts venues, movie theaters, and houses of worship. I'd ask everyone to consider switching to virtual worship for the next few weeks. 4. We're reducing the limit for catered events to 25 indoors and 75 outdoors. If you already have a wedding planned in the next two weeks, we're able to consider an exception if you contact the Department of Business Regulation. 5. We're reducing the capacity limit at malls and big box stores - retailers with more than 30,000 sq. ft. of space - back to the Phase 2 limit of 1 person per 150 sq. ft. Over the last few weeks, we've started to see more crowding at these businesses, and we anticipate that will continue to increase as we head into a big shopping season. 6. In addition to working from home when possible, we're asking businesses to postpone or cancel nonessential work-related travel. We're also leading by example in this regard and have put a hiatus on work-related travel for state employees. 7. We're updating our masking guidance to require masks at all times with anyone you don't live with. That includes anytime you leave your home - including at the gym - and private gatherings if there's anyone there you don't live with. | == | I know this is hard to hear for businesses - and particularly restaurants and bars. While it's my hope that doing this now will prevent us from needing to shut you down entirely in a few weeks, it's still tough. You're doing everything you can, but the fact is that anywhere that people are gathering and taking off masks, the virus is spreading, and that's unavoidable when there's food and drinks. Today, as we announce these new measures, I am also announcing that we will be sending grants to all active Rhode Island restaurant and bars impacted by this early closure order. Restaurants and bars will receive between $2,000 and $10,000 based upon how much business they typically do. These businesses will need to attest that they were affected by this early closure, and then they can expect their grant from the Division of Taxation within 30 days. We know these grants might not make up for what has been an extraordinarily difficult time, but we hope it will help as we make another round of temporary sacrifices to stop the second wave. I'm confident these targeted interventions will make a difference. But that's only true if we all take it to heart. It's been a long 8 months, and it's not lost on me how hard this is. I feel it myself, and I see it in my family. But I also know what can happen when Rhode Islanders rally together. We did it in the spring, and we became national leaders. Let's do it again. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | == | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd2f/18e32a7f/4b802543/7b206bdb/892907720/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd2f/18e32a7f/4b802543/7b206bd8/892907720/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd2f/18e32a7f/4b802543/7b206bd9/892907720/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd2f/18e32a7f/4b802543/7b206b25/892907720/VEsEBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd2f/18e32a7f/4b802543/7b206b27/892907720/VEsEBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd2f/18e32a7f/4b802543/7b206bde/892907720/VEsEBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Urgent Action: Protect the Vote in Pennsylvania NOW!
body:
| |
---
**Do you want to help Protect the Vote in Pennsylvania from the comfort of your own home??**

In a nutshell, we need people to check to see if their ballots were counted in Pennsylvania, if they live/vote there.

We also need people to check to make sure ballots that shouldn’t have been counted were not counted. For example, if people have deceased relatives that lived in Pennsylvania, we need to check their names to see if someone else voted in their names.

See below for details for each category where we need help, and what you should do, and be sure to share this with others. [And, if you are able to support our work to Protect the Vote, please help out!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzEwLWM4ZjM1ZDg1YjU1NDRjODhiNjM5Yzc3ZDY5MzU3Mzlm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9mdW5kMT0yNSZmdW5kMj01MCZmdW5kMz0xMDAmbWlkPTQyOTM0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=nws51DmDoreOc8WM140W1Q)

**Situation: You live in Pennsylvania or can legally vote there (i.e. by absentee ballot):**
**[Use this official PA state website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzEwLWM4ZjM1ZDg1YjU1NDRjODhiNjM5Yzc3ZDY5MzU3Mzlm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF2b3RlcnNlcnZpY2VzLnBhLmdvdi9wYWdlcy9iYWxsb3R0cmFja2luZy5hc3B4P21pZD00MjkzNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=3znxSE-tTegFFIVtOmLfaw)** to check on your ballot! You need your first and last name, birthdate, and county in which you live/vote.

If your ballot has not been counted or the website indicates it was never received, or something else that is weird, [please fill out this form](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzEwLWM4ZjM1ZDg1YjU1NDRjODhiNjM5Yzc3ZDY5MzU3Mzlm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZS1Dd3hsUTB4eUUwOHNuaVVqTk1teVV6TXczYXBodmVLbTBMYjFKUHFjNFVpRXVRL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MjkzNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=RYW1-Vj2P6JWKSkgxiHnig) to let us know, so that we can pass it on.
**Situation: You used to live in Pennsylvania; OR you have a deceased relative who lived in Pennsylvania; OR you have a friend or relative that used to live in Pennsylvania; OR other similar circumstance:**
[**Use this official PA state website**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzEwLWM4ZjM1ZDg1YjU1NDRjODhiNjM5Yzc3ZDY5MzU3Mzlm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF2b3RlcnNlcnZpY2VzLnBhLmdvdi9wYWdlcy9iYWxsb3R0cmFja2luZy5hc3B4P21pZD00MjkzNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=S76iJIQamJokp2OVtOwdzw) to make sure that a ballot wasn’t printed out in your name (or your deceased relative’s, or friend who moved, etc.), and used by someone else.

If you know the first and last name, birthdate, and county where you or the other people you’re checking lived, then you can check on your own. If you don’t have all of the information, then please reach out to the people you want to check on, and get them to check or give you the information.

If you see that you or they have submitted a ballot and this is fraudulent, [please fill out this form](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzEwLWM4ZjM1ZDg1YjU1NDRjODhiNjM5Yzc3ZDY5MzU3Mzlm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZS1Dd3hsUTB4eUUwOHNuaVVqTk1teVV6TXczYXBodmVLbTBMYjFKUHFjNFVpRXVRL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MjkzNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=wZxbvHXB4S6uamVx2fpA0g) so that we can pass it on.
I can’t express this with enough urgency: we are watching the media, in collusion with the Democrats, steal the Presidential election, and possibly the Senate. I, and the rest of the support team, are working night and day to do whatever we can to stop the steal. This is going to include a major information offensive as the media and Joe Biden’s campaign look to call the election and convince Americans it is over. **[Please help us continue this work to Protect the Vote and protect America with a financial gift if you can.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzEwLWM4ZjM1ZDg1YjU1NDRjODhiNjM5Yzc3ZDY5MzU3Mzlm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9mdW5kMT0yNSZmdW5kMj01MCZmdW5kMz0xMDAmbWlkPTQyOTM0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=BiJ2SS7x4lVFXU2CetW9cw)**

Thank you! Please keep an eye on your email for other ways to help Protect the Vote – it is crucial you and I, and every other patriot, act quickly and **WE DO NOT GIVE UP!**

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzEwLWM4ZjM1ZDg1YjU1NDRjODhiNjM5Yzc3ZDY5MzU3Mzlm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9mdW5kMT0yNSZmdW5kMj01MCZmdW5kMz0xMDAmbWlkPTQyOTM0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=ZJAJEdZdauiQ8zw8zjMlBw)
|
---

**[View This Email in a Browser](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20310-c8f35d85b5544c88b639c77d6935739f/74/914/f1a286b9-a36a-4b02-8146-5641894f81a8)** | **[Manage Subscriptions or Unsubscribe](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzEwLWM4ZjM1ZDg1YjU1NDRjODhiNjM5Yzc3ZDY5MzU3Mzlm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9teS50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9jb21tdW5pY2F0aW9uLXByZWZlcmVuY2VzP2lkPVQxOG85dzBldWpLb2s4bVFBUSZtaWQ9NDI5MzQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=etjuRrMlkAgO771sT-1pQA)**

Peter,
While votes are still being counted in some states, **we know the race for the Senate will continue in Georgia.** _**We are in danger of losing the Senate to extremist liberals who want to raise your taxes, defund the police, and pass legislation for a sweeping government takeover.**_

body:
Claudia needs you in this fight to make sure that every ballot cast gets counted Friend, we can’t waste any time right now.
